query: SELECT id, section, entity, status, triggered_by, row_count, error_message, current_stage, progress, resume_page, started_at, finished_at FROM sync_logs WHERE status = 'success' AND entity = 'all' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT id, section, entity, status, triggered_by, row_count, error_message, current_stage, progress, resume_page, started_at, finished_at FROM sync_logs WHERE status = 'success' AND entity = 'all' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10;
